menu.name: Truffle Tagliatelle
menu.description: Fresh handmade tagliatelle tossed in black truffle cream sauce with parmesan shavings.

menu.name: Seafood Linguine
menu.description: Linguine with prawns, mussels, and clams in white wine garlic sauce.

menu.name: Margherita Pizza
menu.description: San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, basil on wood-fired dough.

menu.name: Ravioli al Tartufo
menu.description: Handmade ravioli stuffed with truffle ricotta, served in sage butter.

menu.name: Bruschetta
menu.description: Grilled ciabatta topped with fresh tomato, basil, and balsamic glaze.

menu.name: Penne Arrabbiata
menu.description: Penne in fiery tomato sauce with garlic, chili flakes, and fresh basil.

menu.name: Risotto Milanese
menu.description: Creamy saffron risotto with bone marrow and parmesan.

menu.name: Tiramisu
menu.description: Classic Italian dessert with mascarpone, espresso-soaked ladyfingers, and cocoa.
